reason: picoz is a safety-critical personal trading research repo with market/API credentials and local/Postgres migration history, but no Supabase tenant ref or repo-local Infisical workspace declaration was found. Forcing it into the current Supabase-shaped L168 registry would be false precision. It needs a SkillOS adapter for non-Supabase secret contexts before L168 can become a hard deploy gate for this class.
